query: SELECT u.name, u.open_id, r.taskInstruction, r.investmentRules, r.dataLibrary, r.updatedAt FROM rpa_configs r JOIN users u ON r.userId = u.id ORDER BY r.updatedAt DESC LIMIT 3;
